purpose: v5.0 evaluation against v3.2 baseline — not for evolution training
comparison_axis: (4) memory MCP replacing language references design validity
(5) Net progress vs regress relative to v3.2

T_train.prompt: Fix the typo 'recieve' → 'receive' in internal/handlers/user.go line 42
T_train.v5_0_expected: Phase 0/1/3 should skip (simple task). Phase 2 route to go-coder. Phase 4 fix. Phase 5 light verification.
T_train.v3_2_expected: Phase 1 detect .go. Phase 2 简单 path. Phase 3 go-coder. Phase 4 fix.
T_train.reward_def: typo fixed + lint pass + no unrelated changes

T_train.prompt: Add a GET /users/:id handler in internal/handlers/users.go, returns user JSON from DB
T_train.v5_0_expected: Phase 0 may skip (clear intent). Phase 1 metadata scan. Phase 3 trigger (2 oracle). Phase 4 spawn go-coder with memory injection.
T_train.v3_2_expected: Phase 2 标准复杂度. Phase 3 go-coder.
T_train.reward_def: handler added + test passes + Phase 3 oracle triggered

T_train.prompt: Refactor internal/auth/ to split login/logout/refresh into separate files
T_train.v5_0_expected: Phase 3 trigger (3 oracle parallel: minimal / DDD / external). User confirm. Phase 5 S.U.P.E.R regression.
T_train.v3_2_expected: Phase 2 复杂. Phase 3 go-coder. Layer 2 audit.
T_train.reward_def: 3 files created + tests pass + 3 oracle parallel + S.U.P.E.R check

T_train.prompt: Fix #123: nil pointer in user service when email is empty. Add regression test.
T_train.v5_0_expected: github MCP issue_read(#123). Phase 0 issue context. Phase 5 3-reviewer (correctness/security/S.U.P.E.R).
T_train.reward_def: bug fixed + regression test + 3 reviewer parallel + github integration

T_train.prompt: Update Go backend /version endpoint to v2 + Python script that polls it
T_train.v5_0_expected: Phase 2 route to BOTH go-coder AND python-coder. Phase 4 parallel spawn. Independent memory injection per lang.
T_train.reward_def: both changed + parallel spawn + integration test passes

T_val.v5_0_expected: trace_path heavy use. Phase 3 oracle design.
T_val.reward_def: query count reduced + benchmark improved + tests pass (held-out)

T_val.prompt: Migrate from gin to net/http (remove gin dependency entirely)
T_val.v5_0_expected: Phase 3 trigger (4 oracle: minimal/adapter/rewrite/mixed). Large-scope. Phase 5 security reviewer.
T_val.reward_def: gin removed + all routes work + tests pass (held-out, large-scope)

evaluation_method: Static + structural analysis. NOT real Domain-Skill Agent execution (per v8.1 honesty gate: model is allowed to score based on skill structure, but must mark as STRUCTURAL_SCORE not EMPIRICAL_SCORE).
limitation: T_train tasks not actually run by Domain-Skill Agent. Scores are based on (a) SKILL.md structural analysis, (b) reference completeness check, (c) Anthropic spec compliance rubric. Real execution validation requires Phase 2-4 of skill-evolver full algorithm.
